expected_value: Charge device for at least 20 minutes
Power on until the blue light pulses twice
Scan the pairing code in the app
Name the device and confirm room

facts.description: The first charge requirement should be included before pairing begins.
facts.expected_value: Charge for at least 20 minutes before setup.

facts.description: The blue indicator light pulsing twice is the cue before app pairing.
facts.expected_value: Blue indicator light pulses twice before scanning the pairing code.

facts.description: Reset pin caution should be included without making reset part of normal setup.
facts.expected_value: Do not press the reset pin unless support asks you to do so.

facts.description: Reset pin must not be presented as a normal setup or pairing action.

calculation_notes: Combine the manual's setup procedure with quick_start_notes.txt. Preserve the normal setup sequence, include first-charge and blue-light readiness cues, and exclude reset-pin troubleshooting as a main step.
